subcodes.first_line: O Samandar! The Name of Generosity hath appeared, upon Him rest My Glory. Thy mention hath reached the Wronged One, and We make mention of thee. He, verily, is [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا سمندر قد حضر اسم الجود علیه بهائی و ذکرک لدی المظلوم و ذکرناک انه هو
subcodes.subjects: @wisdom [hikmat], @heedlessness and ignorance of the people, @growth of the Cause, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @false claims to divine revelation or spiritual stations, @the power of words; of speech
